description_long: This is a rustic, round loaf of bread with a thick, rugged crust and a natural, uneven surface. The top of the loaf features a prominent crack and deep fissures, suggesting an artisanal baking process with a hearty, crunchy exterior. The coloration is a mix of light brown and grayish tones, with some darker areas around the cracks, indicating a well-baked crust. The bottom view reveals a dense, porous interior typical of whole grain or sourdough bread. The loaf appears unsliced and substantial, with a slightly flattened dome shape. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A rustic, round loaf of bread with a thick, cracked crust and a dense, porous interior. The surface is rugged and artisanal, with natural brown and gray tones.
description_view_0: The loaf is seen from a side angle, highlighting a large crack and the rough, uneven crust texture.
description_view_1: This view shows the top of the bread, emphasizing the central fissure and the rounded, domed shape.
description_view_2: A side perspective reveals the irregular, rugged crust and the natural, hand-formed appearance.
description_view_3: The bottom or cut side is visible, displaying the dense, porous interior and the thick crust edge.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rugged with deep, natural cracks and fissures, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. There is no visible flour dusting, seeds, or decorative scoring.
